en: I'm going to kill that kid!
ja: あのガキを殺してやる！
vi: Tao se giet thang nho do!

en: Where the hell did you take your shoes off?
ja: どこで靴を脱いだんだ？
vi: May cat giay o dau vay?

en: Why the hell are you dressed like a chicken?
ja: なんで鶏みたいな格好してるんだ？
vi: Sao may an mac nhu con ga vay?
Tao o tren nay, do ngu!

en: You guys give up, or you're thirsty for more?
ja: お前ら降参か、それともまだやるか？
zhTW: 你們放棄了，還是還想繼續？
vi: Chung may dau hang hay con muon tiep?
